tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Nothings Gonna Change My Love For You

content:
[Intro]
[ch]G#[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]C#/G#[/ch] [ch]D#/A#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]
[ch]G#[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]C#/G#[/ch] [ch]D#/A#[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]                                [ch]D#m7[/ch]
    You know our love was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]
    The kind of love that lasts forever[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]                            [ch]D#m7[/ch]
    And I want you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
    From tonight until the end of time[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#/A#[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
    You should know, everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#/G[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]C#/F[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
    Always on my mind, in my heart[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#/G[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]    [ch]A#[/ch]
    In my soul, Baby[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]    [ch]D#[/ch]                 [ch]D#/G[/ch]
    You're the meaning in my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]D#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
    You're the inspiration[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#[/ch]                [ch]D#/G[/ch]
    You bring feeling to my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]D#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
    You're the inspiration[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]C#/F[/ch]
    Wanna have you near me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B/F#[/ch]                   [ch]Bm/F#[/ch]
    I wanna have you hear me sayin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#/C#[/ch]                          [ch]C#sus4[/ch] [ch]C#[/ch]   [ch]F#sus4/E[/ch] [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]B/F#[/ch]
    No one needs you more than I      need you[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E/B[/ch] [ch]F#/C#[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]                                   [ch]D#m7[/ch]
    And I know, yes I know that it's plain to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
    So in love when we're together[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]D#m7[/ch]
    Now I know that I need you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
    From tonight until the end of time[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#/A#[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]D#/G[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]C#/F[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
    Always on my mind, in my heart[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#/G[/ch]  [ch]G#[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
